title: Zelda 2 Town Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Basically, here's proof that I'm not dead.

I'm sorry I haven't submitted a video in over a month. It's not that I've quit. It's not that I'm working on some huge project that takes this long. It's that I'm doing other things. Pursuing other hobbies. I'll try getting into this more when summer vacation begins.

Ok about this song.
Well, it's pretty simple. Really simple. I was just bored when I did this. There are no tricks, glitches, or amazing stunts in this song. I finished it in early May but I wasn't planning on submitting it. I figured it couldn't hurt, though, so I decided I would today. Enjoy!

EDIT:
Apparently YouTube did something to the audio so that quiet parts are louder and louder parts are quieter. This defeats the purpose of dynamics in music, so I hope it goes away. After pauses in the music the volume will temporarily get louder and then come back down to normal level. This is not my fault, for the copy still saved on my computer does not do this. Please YouTube for the sake of the musical community remove this feature from newly uploaded videos.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker
